title: Ubiquiti U6-Enterprise-IW - UniFi AP U6 Enterprise In-Wall
description: U6 Enterprise In-Wall is an access point designed for use in office spaces with high coverage density. The universal wall mounting bracket is ready for use with most commonly used wiring boxes worldwide The 1G/2.5 Gbps input port on the back supports 802.3at/bt power supply with a voltage range of 44-57V . On the bottom, it is possible to use a total of 4 ports with a speed of 10/100/1000Mbps , one of the ports offers PoE-out option Wireless transmission is handled by a modern radio part with WiFi 4/5/6/6E standards support and WPA / WPA2 / WPA3 encryption . The maximum transmission speed is 300Mbps for 2.4GHz , 4.8Gbps for 5GHz and 4.8Gbps for 6GHz Supported by UniFi Network version 7.2.85 and later For the device, you need to download the original software called UniFi controller from the official website, thanks to which the entire network can be controlled. The indisputable advantage of the UniFi controller is that it is completely free without any restrictions ! This central management will allow you to upload maps and set basic parameters such as SSID, guest account, start page, traffic statistics and the list and status of associated clients always easily and quickly Zero Handoff Roaming - uninterrupted transition between individual APs Wireless uplink (suitable where it is impossible to get a data cable) Up to 8 SSIDs Detailed traffic statistics Guest network Voucher system Load balance - maintaining an even load / switching clients Speed limiting for each SSID Device Wall mount Screws GPSR Technical support for this product is available on [email protected] email…
specsSearch: Wireless features Wireless frequency 2.4 + 5 + 6 GHz (triple band) WiFi standards 802.11n, 802.11a, 802.11ac, 802.11b/g, 802.11ax MU-MIMO Yes Transmission speed - 5GHz [Mb/s] 4804 Transmission speed - 2.4GHz [Mb/s] 300 Transmission speed - 6GHz [Mb/s] 4804 Tx power 2.4GHz [dBm] 22 Tx power 5GHz [dBm] 26 Tx power 6GHz [dBm] 26 Security WPA-PSK, WPA-Enterprise (WPA/WPA2/WPA3) 2.4GHz MIMO 2 x 2 5GHz MIMO 4 x 4 6GHz MIMO 4 x 4 Type of antenna Built-in Internal antennas 10 Roaming Yes Antenna gain [dBi] 6, 4 Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (1) 1G/2.5Gbps + (4) 10/100/1000Mbps Gigabit LAN Yes Power Power over Ethernet 802.3at, 802.3bt, 44 .. 57V DC PoE type PoE-Out + PoE-In Max. power consumption [W] 21 Physical characteristics Purpose Indoor Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 30 up to 60 Weight [g] 885 Width [mm] 157 Height [mm] 160 Depth [mm] 34
